import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_ints(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(n)
      sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn dedup(_ sorted: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut prev_val = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(n)
      if not has_prev or n != prev_val
        result = list.push(result, n)
        prev_val = n
        has_prev = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)

  mut combined: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums1.len()
    match nums1.get(i)
    when Some(n)
      combined = list.push(combined, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums2.len()
    match nums2.get(j)
    when Some(n)
      combined = list.push(combined, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  let sorted = sort_ints(combined)
  let unique = dedup(sorted)

  mut output = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < unique.len()
    match unique.get(k)
    when Some(n)
      if k == 0
        output = "#{n}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{n}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
